headline: Crypto Surges 10% as AI Selling Eases

headline: $1B Crypto Bill Adds Ethics Provisions Overnight

article.title: White House agrees to ethics provisions in market structure bill
article.summary: The price of Bitcoin moved above $66,000 to reach a seven-week high on Tuesday as reports circulated of a deal with the White House to address ethics in the CLARITY Act.

headline: Semiconductors Surge 3% as Stocks Rebound Sharply
